subject: texas monthly november 2001: how enron blew it

emails.subject: FW: Texas Monthly November 2001: How Enron Blew It
emails.subject_base: Texas Monthly November 2001: How Enron Blew It
emails.body: Vince, I have not heard from you for a while. Here is an article you might find interesting. Talk to you soon. Tony To: Harrison, Susan; Thorne, Judy; Newhouse, Pegi; Mends, Anthony; Lawrence, Robin

emails.subject: RE: Texas Monthly November 2001: How Enron Blew It
emails.subject_base: Texas Monthly November 2001: How Enron Blew It
emails.body: RE: Texas Monthly November 2001: How Enron Blew It Tony, It was a very hectic period. I shall catch you one day and give you an update. Vince To: Kaminski, Vince J

emails.subject: RE: Texas Monthly November 2001: How Enron Blew It
emails.subject_base: Texas Monthly November 2001: How Enron Blew It
emails.body: Thanks, I am looking forward to it. To: Mends, Anthony
